ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A hashed version of the user's password */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., author, moderator, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* The URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A short bio of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* The user's location */,
  "interests" TEXT /* The user's interests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the post */,
  "title" TEXT /* The title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* The content of the post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* The type of the post (e.g., Blog entry, Story) */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* The date the post was created */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The date the post was last updated */,
  "replies_count" INTEGER /* The number of replies to the post */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags for the post */,
  "categories" TEXT /* Categories the post belongs to */,
  "featured_image" TEXT /* The URL of the post's featured image */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Whether the post is a draft or not */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* The date the post was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post being replied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* The content of the reply */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* The date the reply was posted */,
  "parent_reply_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent reply (for threaded discussions) */,
  "is_edited" INTEGER /* Whether the reply has been edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the viewed post */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* The date the post was viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who viewed the post */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* The ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the liked post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who liked the post */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* The date the post was liked */,
  "type" TEXT /* The type of like (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shared post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who shared the post */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* The date the post was shared */,
  "platform" TEXT /* The platform on which the post was shared (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "shared_text" TEXT /* The text shared along with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_shares_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a post */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post that has been edited */,
  "content" TEXT /* The content of the post in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* The date this version was created */,
  "version_author_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* A comment about the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation log entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the moderated post */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the moderated reply */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the moderator who took the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* The action taken (e.g., edit, delete, approve) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* The date the action was taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* The reason for the moderation action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the moderation action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
